phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si ordina al banco, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see OR-dee-nah al BAN-koh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the cashier, then at the counter.

responses.english: At the cashier, then at the counter.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, a che ora aprite la mattina, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, ah keh OH-rah ah-PREE-teh la mat-TEE-nah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: The hours are posted at the entrance.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, come si ordinano le confezioni regalo, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwon-JOR-noh KOH-meh see or-dee-NAH-noh leh kon-fay-TSYOH-nee ray-GAH-loh pehr fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Si ordinano direttamente al banco cassa.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE ohr-dee-NAH-noh dee-reht-tah-MEHN-teh AHL BAHN-koh KAH-ssah
likely_response.translation_en: They are ordered directly at the cashier desk.

responses.english: They are ordered directly at the cashier desk.
responses.phonetic: SEE ohr-dee-NAH-noh dee-reht-tah-MEHN-teh AHL BAHN-koh KAH-ssah
responses.french: Si ordinano direttamente al banco cassa.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, avete la cassata siciliana oggi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, ah-VEH-teh la kas-SAHT-ah see-chee-lee-AH-nah OJ-jee, per fah-VOH-reh
